source: Public ESPN RSS feeds; Yahoo Scout/browser scrape path pending validation
warnings: Automated v0.1 uses public RSS sources with URLs for reliability; Yahoo Scout browser collection remains a separately documented POC path.

items.headline: Ex-Kansas player charged with attempted murder
items.detail: Lagerald Vick, a member of the Kansas Jayhawks' Final Four basketball team in 2018, has been charged with attempted first-degree murder in Tennessee.

items.headline: Sources: Brown HC Martin becomes U-M assistant
items.detail: Mike Martin, the winningest basketball coach at Brown, is leaving the Bears to become an assistant on Mike Boynton's staff at Michigan, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Ranking top coaches: Can Curt Cignetti win this ti...
items.detail: Our reporters make -- and defend -- their picks for the coaches they'd want to lead their team.

items.headline: 2026 WNBA championship odds: Lynx remain on top; V...
items.detail: Entering the week at 17-7, the Golden State Valkyries now have the fourth-shortest odds to win the WNBA title.

items.headline: Prospects watch: The future is not quite now
items.detail: Eric Karabell reports from the MLB draft and Futures Game to let fantasy managers know whose names you need to know.

items.headline: Ohtani, Witt and ... Pete Alonso! First-half MVPs ...
items.detail: We name each club's top performer so far -- and how many All-Stars they'd have in a perfect world.

items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
items.detail: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
items.detail: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.

items.headline: Signed presidential baseballs top $3M at auction
items.detail: A set of 21 presidential autographed baseballs, featuring every president of the United States since Theodore Roosevelt, has sold via Hunt Auctions' MLB All-Star live auction for $3,055,000 during All-Star week.

items.headline: Walker hopes Derby win stirs Black kids to play
items.detail: Cardinals outfielder Jordan Walker wants to be a role model, and he hopes his victory in the Home Run Derby inspires more Black kids to play baseball.

items.headline: Ohtani rookie card sells for a record $3.365M
items.detail: A 1-of-1 rookie card of MLB star Shohei Ohtani has sold privately for a record $3.365 million.

items.headline: Walker walks it off: Cards slugger wins HR Derby
items.detail: Jordan Walker homered on his last six swings to beat hometown favorite Kyle Schwarber, becoming the first Cardinal to win the Home Run Derby.

items.headline: Harper denies giving FanDuel consent for fan video...
items.detail: Phillies star Bryce Harper said Monday that he did not know how FanDuel would use a personalized video he made for a customer, who has since accused the sportsbook in a lawsuit of taking advantage of his gambling addiction.

items.headline: Schwarber to lead off for NL; 3 new AL starters
items.detail: The Phillies' Kyle Schwarber will lead off for the NL in the All-Star Game as the replacement for Shohei Ohtani, while Riley Greene, Ben Rice and Cody Bellinger will start for the AL.

items.headline: 👀 Giants draft Barry Bonds' nephew in 3rd round
items.detail: Peyton Bonds hit .352 with six home runs and 13 stolen bases for Rutgers this past season.

items.headline: From unranked in high school to summer league stan...
items.detail: Once overlooked as recruits, these summer league rookies are proving why they were first-round draft picks.

items.headline: NBA summer league: First impressions of rookies an...
items.detail: 2026 summer league is in full swing! Our NBA insiders break down first impressions of top rookie debuts.

items.headline: Live updates: France, Spain meet with World Cup fi...
items.detail: null
